modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble uploading a file to D2L DropBox for class.

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to upload a file to their class. They needed to copy and paste it from their computer. But something went wrong with the DropBox. They couldn't get it to work as expected.
short_description: Trouble uploading a file to D2L DropBox for class.
description: The user was trying to upload a file to their class. They needed to copy and paste it from their computer. But something went wrong with the DropBox. They couldn't get it to work as expected.
